nodes.norm_label: mobile guard — ingest/lint/init blocked on mobile, query allowed

nodes.norm_label: format-migration.test.ts — settings migration for format operation

nodes.norm_label: format preview flow — temp file in !temp/, apply/cancel/refine cycle

nodes.norm_label: domainstore auto-migration of !wiki/ prefix on load

nodes.label: domain.test.js — JS duplicate of validateDomainId tests
nodes.norm_label: domain.test.js — js duplicate of validatedomainid tests

nodes.label: wipeDomainFolder (--force reinit)
nodes.rationale: Removes all files under !Wiki/<folder>/ recursively; does not touch files outside that path; skips files that fail to remove and continues; returns list of removed files

nodes.label: Lint Prompt
nodes.rationale: Instructs LLM to review wiki-base quality (duplicates, gaps, stale content, broken links) and return fixed pages as JSON array with path, content, annotation

nodes.label: 4-segment wiki path rule
nodes.rationale: All wiki article paths must follow !Wiki/<domain>/<entity_type>/<Article>.md exactly 4 segments. Prevents LLM from generating paths with repeated domain or too-deep nesting, which would create inconsistent vault structure and break graph traversal.

nodes.label: MIPROv2 prompt optimization pattern
nodes.rationale: Uses DSPy MIPROv2 with auto=light and no bootstrapped/labeled demos to perform lightweight prompt optimization; post-optimization placeholder restoration ensures template variables survive rewriting.

nodes.label: make_lm factory
nodes.rationale: Factory function selecting LM backend via DSPY_BACKEND env var; supports ollama, ollama-openai, claude-code

nodes.label: DSPy MIPROv2 prompt optimizer
nodes.rationale: Reads accumulated JSONL dev log, optimizes system prompts for llm-wiki operations using MIPROv2 with auto=light; ClaudeCodeLM adapter bridges DSPy to claude CLI

nodes.label: WikiController
nodes.rationale: Single-flight guard pattern: controller.ts rejects parallel runs via this._running to prevent concurrent stdout stream corruption. Also validates cwd/iclaudePath before dispatch.

nodes.label: ClaudeCliClient
nodes.rationale: Spawns iclaude.sh with stdio:[ignore,pipe,pipe]. Uses OpenAI-compatible LlmClient interface. Flags must be passed via -- separator because iclaude.sh reserves -p/--proxy for its own use.

nodes.label: parseStreamLine
nodes.rationale: Parses one stdout JSON line into a RunEvent. Non-JSON lines (iclaude banners) are silently ignored.

nodes.label: LlmWikiView
nodes.rationale: Obsidian ItemView that renders steps, metrics, and history live in the sidebar panel via onEvent().

nodes.label: Settings / autodetectCwd
nodes.rationale: autodetectCwd walks up to 6 directory levels to find the workspace root. historyLimit defaults to 20 as a compromise between UX and settings.json size.

nodes.label: TypeScript Types (WikiOperation, RunEvent, WikiDomain)
nodes.rationale: WikiDomain union type on line 8 is the single source of truth for domains. All other places derive from it; only this type needs updating when a domain is added.

nodes.label: selectSeeds
nodes.rationale: Jaccard similarity on pageId tokens plus first 200 characters of content to select seed pages for query.

nodes.label: Stream-JSON Protocol (stdout iclaude)
nodes.rationale: Each stdout line is one JSON object: system/assistant/user/result types. Non-JSON lines ignored. stdin is closed (ignore).

nodes.label: Single-Flight Guard
nodes.rationale: Only one operation at a time; concurrent attempts receive an Obsidian Notice. Enforced via this._running in controller.ts to protect stdout stream integrity.

nodes.label: Patch Versioning Policy
nodes.rationale: Before every build: auto-increment patch in package.json and src/manifest.json. Minor/major bumped manually only.

nodes.label: AI Wiki — Obsidian Plugin
nodes.rationale: Offline-first LLM knowledge wiki for Obsidian; dual backends (Ollama/OpenAI + Claude Agent); operations: Ingest, Query, Lint, Fix, Init, Format, Chat; mobile: Query only

nodes.label: Shell Execution Security model
nodes.rationale: Path validated to be absolute with no traversal before each spawn; first-run consent modal required; shellConsentGiven flag in data.json; revocable by user

nodes.label: wiki_* frontmatter fields preserved on format apply — programmatically managed, must not be lost during LLM reformatting
nodes.norm_label: wiki_* frontmatter fields preserved on format apply — programmatically managed, must not be lost during llm reformatting

nodes.label: {{placeholder}} template syntax
nodes.rationale: Templates use {{placeholder}} syntax so that restore_placeholders() can ensure named slots survive MIPROv2 rewriting, preserving prompt structure through optimization.

nodes.label: DSPy MIPROv2: automated prompt optimization via Optuna
nodes.norm_label: dspy miprov2: automated prompt optimization via optuna

nodes.label: ClaudeCodeLM: DSPy-compatible adapter for Claude CLI
nodes.norm_label: claudecodelm: dspy-compatible adapter for claude cli

nodes.label: CREATE rule
nodes.rationale: Entity is created when not present in wiki and mentions >= min_mentions_for_page threshold

nodes.label: UPDATE rule
nodes.rationale: Entity is updated (not deleted) when it already exists in wiki — additive-only semantics to preserve existing knowledge

nodes.label: SKIP rule
nodes.rationale: Entity is skipped when mentions are too few or information already present — avoids noise in wiki

nodes.label: 4-segment path rule
nodes.rationale: Article path must be exactly !Wiki/<domain>/<entity>/<Article>.md — 4 segments. Prevents domain duplication and extra nesting.

nodes.label: frontmatter requirement
nodes.rationale: wiki_sources, wiki_updated, wiki_status are mandatory; wiki_sources must use Obsidian [[path]] link format

nodes.label: annotation field
nodes.rationale: One-sentence entity description added per page for semantic search

nodes.label: ingest JSON output schema
nodes.rationale: Output: {reasoning, pages:[{path, content, annotation}]} — only JSON, no other text

nodes.label: lint JSON output schema
nodes.rationale: Output: {reasoning, report, fixes:[{path, content, annotation}]} — fixes contains only changed pages; report is full markdown

nodes.label: fixes array rule
nodes.rationale: fixes array contains ONLY changed pages; empty array if no fixes needed — minimizes output size

nodes.label: dead links cleanup rule
nodes.rationale: Dead [[X]] links must be removed or replaced; missing frontmatter added; duplicates merged

nodes.label: Shell Execution Consent
nodes.rationale: On first launch with claude-agent backend, a modal asks for explicit confirmation before any operation runs. Consent revoked by removing shellConsentGiven from data.json. Required because subprocess inherits OS user permissions.

nodes.label: Mobile Support
nodes.rationale: Only Query works on mobile. Ingest, Lint, Init are desktop-only. Claude Agent on mobile falls back to Native Agent automatically.

nodes.label: Wiki Knowledge Synthesis
nodes.contributor: rationale: LLM extracts entities from a source and creates/updates wiki pages using CREATE/UPDATE/SKIP rules based on mention count thresholds

nodes.label: Entity Extraction Rules (CREATE/UPDATE/SKIP)
nodes.contributor: rationale: CREATE when entity absent and mentions >= min_mentions_for_page; UPDATE when entity exists, add info without deleting; SKIP when too few mentions or info already present

nodes.label: Wiki Path Rule (4 Segments)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Article path must be exactly 4 segments: !Wiki/<domain>/<entity>/<Article>.md — no domain duplication, no 5-segment paths

nodes.label: Wiki Editor via Lint Report
nodes.contributor: rationale: Accepts user task and lint report, fixes indicated problems; returns JSON with summary and fixed pages; empty pages array if no fixes needed

nodes.label: Wiki Quality Reviewer
nodes.contributor: rationale: Analyzes wiki quality — duplication, gaps, vague definitions, stale content, broken links — and prepares corrected versions of problematic pages

nodes.label: Lint Output Schema (reasoning/report/fixes)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Output JSON contains reasoning chain, markdown report, and fixes array with only changed pages

nodes.label: Domain Architect (domain-map.json generator)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Generates a domain entry for domain-map.json with id, name, wiki_folder, source_paths, entity_types, language_notes fields

nodes.label: EntityType Structure
nodes.contributor: rationale: Each entity_type has: type, description, extraction_cues, min_mentions_for_page, wiki_subfolder — subfolder must be one word without slashes or domain_id

nodes.label: wiki_subfolder Rule (one word, no slashes)
nodes.contributor: rationale: wiki_subfolder must be a single word, no slashes, no domain_id prefix. Valid: network, processes. Invalid: os/network, os_network

nodes.label: Format Schema Frontmatter Fields
nodes.contributor: rationale: Non-wiki frontmatter: tags, aliases, created, updated, external_links (only if http URLs exist in body), related (wikilinks only if already referenced in body). wiki_* fields excluded — managed programmatically

nodes.label: Format Schema Content Rules
nodes.contributor: rationale: Hard prohibitions: no invented facts (except vision image extraction), no fact deletion, no meaning distortion; all changes listed in report

nodes.label: annotation Field (one-sentence entity description)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Each page in ingest/lint/lint-chat output includes annotation: one sentence describing the entity for semantic search

nodes.label: effort field / --effort arg
nodes.rationale: effort dropdown + thinkingBudgetTokens added for claude/native-agent; iclaude.sh receives --effort flag via spawn args

nodes.label: AbortSignal / mobileFetch
nodes.rationale: Mobile AbortSignal implemented via Promise.race to work around missing AbortSignal.race on mobile

nodes.label: Wiki Index Rewrite to Grouped Markdown
nodes.norm_label: wiki index rewrite to grouped markdown

nodes.label: WikiLink alias and path forbidden rationale
nodes.norm_label: wikilink alias and path forbidden rationale

nodes.label: Settings split synced vs local rationale
nodes.norm_label: settings split synced vs local rationale

nodes.label: PageSimilarityService Jaccard vs embedding modes rationale
nodes.norm_label: pagesimilarityservice jaccard vs embedding modes rationale

nodes.label: VaultTools decoupling from Obsidian internals rationale
nodes.norm_label: vaulttools decoupling from obsidian internals rationale

nodes.label: Test: WikiController per-op timeout forwarded to buildAgentRunner
applies entity_types_delta from ingest and emits domain_updated with merged types
